title: The Spark of Hope
lines: You discover a small, wax-sealed box of long-stem matches. To those who lived in the before-time, this was a triviality. To you, it is the gift of fire.
The box is dry, the wood of the matches perfectly preserved within their red tips. A single strike could illuminate the darkest corner of the farm.
You carefully tuck the box away, protecting the precious spark from the damp night air.

options.desc: Return to the main floor of the barn
